serverInfo.name: code-impact-mcp
serverInfo.description: Lightweight pre-commit safety gate for AI agents. Answers 'is this change safe?' with PASS/WARN/BLOCK verdict in seconds. Zero setup, no database.

tools.name: analyze_impact
tools.description: Analyze the blast radius of changing specific files. Returns which files would be directly and transitively affected, with a risk score (0-1). Use BEFORE committing multi-file changes to understand what might break. Does NOT modify any files.

projectRoot.description: Absolute path to the project root directory

files.description: Relative file paths that are being changed (e.g. ['src/utils/helpers.ts'])

tsconfigPath.description: Optional tsconfig path relative to projectRoot

tools.name: get_dependencies
tools.description: Get the import and importedBy relationships for a specific file. Shows what this file depends on and what depends on it. Use to understand coupling before refactoring a file.

projectRoot.description: Absolute path to the project root directory

tsconfigPath.description: Optional tsconfig path relative to projectRoot

tools.name: detect_cycles
tools.description: Find circular dependencies in the project and return compact strongly-connected-component groups. Use to spot cycle hotspots before refactors or to explain why a gate_check result warned or blocked.

projectRoot.description: Absolute path to the project root directory

tsconfigPath.description: Optional tsconfig path relative to projectRoot

tools.name: gate_check
tools.description: Pre-commit safety gate. Analyzes specified changes and returns a PASS/WARN/BLOCK verdict with reasons. Use as a bounded decision aid before committing multi-file changes. BLOCK means current impact is too risky. WARN means human review recommended. PASS means low-risk.

projectRoot.description: Absolute path to the project root directory

threshold.description: Risk threshold for BLOCK verdict (0-1, default 0.5)

tsconfigPath.description: Optional tsconfig path relative to projectRoot

tools.name: refresh_graph
tools.description: Rebuild the dependency graph from scratch. Call this after significant file additions/deletions, or if analyze_impact results seem stale. Returns graph statistics including file count, edge count, build time, and any circular dependencies detected.

projectRoot.description: Absolute path to the project root directory

tsconfigPath.description: Optional tsconfig path relative to projectRoot
